case_title: EDITH SUN VS. SCOTT CLEANERS ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,809.00 FILED BY SUN, EDITH AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT CLEANERS WANG, MARY DBA NORIEGA STREET CLEANERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2017 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT SCOTT CLEANERS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-28-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-28-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF EDITH SUN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SCOTT CLEANERS IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY LAURA YAN. MS. YAN IS ASSISTED BY BANNIE CHOW COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT MARY WANG DBA NORIEGA STREET CLEANERS IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY TERRANCE CHEY WITH MANDARIN INTERPRETATION. MR. CHEY WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETERS OATH. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT CLEANERS WANG, MARY DBA NORIEGA STREET CLEANERS
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL [X]GRANTED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $60.00) SERVED JUL-28-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT CLEANERS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SCOTT CLEANERS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-28-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $60.00 SERVED JUL-28-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, MARY DBA NORIEGA STREET CLEANERS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUN, EDITH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCOTT CLEANERS WANG, MARY DBA NORIEGA STREET CLEANERS $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $170.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $470.00, CONCURRENTLY WITH PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF SHALL TURN OVER TO DEFENDANTS THE YELLOW WOOL COAT WHICH IS THE SUBJECT OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
